backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a medication management backend with CRUD operations for medications and dose logging. Stores medications and dose logs in maps, supporting add/update/delete/list for medications and log/history for doses.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four product features (medication management UI, daily schedule view, dose history/adherence view, visual theme) to their corresponding frontend source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose of hooks, utilities, components, and pages in the React app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, primary, card, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Pill Reminder App that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (Today, Medications, History) wrapped in a Layout, ThemeProvider, and Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdherenceSummary: Card component that displays adherence statistics (taken/skipped/missed counts and percentage) for a single medication with a progress bar and color-coded score.
frontend/src/components/DoseEntry.tsx: Row component for a single scheduled dose showing medication name, dosage, and time, with Taken/Skipped/Missed action buttons and optimistic status updates via useLogDose.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app shell with a sticky header, desktop nav, mobile bottom nav, and footer for the PillPal app using TanStack Router links.
frontend/src/components/MedicationCard.t: Renders a card displaying a single medication's details (name, dosage, frequency, times, dates, notes) with edit and delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/MedicationForm.t: Provides a controlled form for adding or editing a medication, handling fields like name, dosage, frequency, scheduled times, dates, and notes with validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports TanStack Query hooks for all backend operations: listing, adding, updating, and deleting medications, plus logging and fetching dose history.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including color tokens for medication dose statuses (taken, skipped, missed).
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging (cn), nanosecond/Date conversions, timestamp formatting helpers, frequency label formatting, and today's date range calculations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Page component displaying medication dose history and adherence stats, with tabs for adherence summary and a chronological log grouped by date, filterable by medication.
frontend/src/pages/MedicationsPage.tsx: Page component for managing medications with add/edit/delete functionality via dialogs, displaying a grid of MedicationCards and using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/TodaySchedulePage.tsx: Page component showing today's scheduled medication doses mapped to current-day timestamps, with a taken/total counter and DoseEntry components for logging each dose.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based colors, custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Lora), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of a pill reminder app project, including existing features (medication management UI, daily schedule, dose history, visual theme, logo), pending feature requests (backend data models for medications and dose logs), and architectural/issue notes.
